# activation

**Instance Property**

A parameter that defines the activation function to use with the RNN operation.

## Declaration

```swift
var activation: MPSGraphRNNActivation { get set }
```

## Discussion

Default value: `MPSGraphRNNActivationRelu`.
title: activation
